title: Karma Shader
description: A stylized, optimized Minecraft shaderpack featuring volumetric voxel clouds, light shafts, rich, reflective water, waving foliage, and custom immersive atmospheres for both the Nether and End dimensions, entirely free of any heavy fog.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd4668c2bc8dabcbdd1db481950a685f1876b418.png)
# Karma Shader

**Karma Shader** brings Minecraft to life with stylized visuals and immersive atmospheres—all while keeping your frame rate smooth! No blinding fog, just pure aesthetic upgrades.

###  Why choose Karma?
*  **Voxel Clouds:** Beautiful, self-shadowed 3D clouds that melt into the horizon.
*  **Enchanted Water:** Two-tone turquoise water with custom reflections and sun glare.
*  **God Rays:** Volumetric light shafts piercing trees and water, day and night.
*  **Living World:** Smooth swaying grass, crops, and leaves reacting to the wind.
*  **The Nether:** Volumetric embers and warm lava vapors (no boring fog).
*  **The End:** Swirling space nebulae, twinkling auroras, and shooting stars!

 *Optimized & fully compatible with **Iris** and **OptiFine**.*
